implemented_contracts: PostgreSQL saved_views table with workspace namespace, state payload, current_version and reversible migration
PostgreSQL saved_view_versions immutable version chain with create/update/restore action_type
Optimistic expected_version conflict response through HTTP 409 and saved-view-conflict-v1 detail
Recovery by restoring a historical version into a new current version
operation_logs success/conflict audit rows for create/update/restore

checks: reject stale update with expected_version 1 after current_version 2
restore target_version 1 from expected_version 2 into current_version 3
reject stale restore after current_version advances to 3
assert operation_logs records three success and three conflict rows

Add real multi-session browser E2E using two contexts against the API-backed saved-view contract
Add user/workspace authn/authz boundary before public multi-user deployment
